_comment: External art overrides for StrongBow. Each entry replaces the built-in PROCEDURAL texture of `key` with an image file. The list is intentionally EMPTY so the game uses the full procedural art set (redesigned heroes, themed per-level walls/floors, recoloured monsters, etc.). To override a piece with a PNG, add an entry like { "key": "hero-vanguard-sheet", "path": "assets/sprites/warrior.png", "kind": "spritesheet", "frameWidth": 20, "frameHeight": 24 }. Special keys: ext-floor / ext-wall retile the whole dungeon.
